title: chylismia tenuissima
intro: Chylismia tenuissima, also known as the slender mariposa lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oenotheraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chylismia tenuissima include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
